title: Cart
description: A shopping cart resource containing line items, discounts, shipping configuration, and pricing.

version.description: Current version for optimistic concurrency control.

customerId.description: ID of the customer who owns this cart.

customerEmail.description: Email of the customer associated with this cart.

cartState.description: Current state of the cart lifecycle.

lineItems.description: Product line items in the cart.

customLineItems.description: Custom line items with user-defined pricing.

taxedPrice.description: The total price with tax breakdown if tax calculation is complete.

taxMode.description: Tax calculation mode for this cart.

inventoryMode.description: Inventory tracking mode for line items.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the cart was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the cart was last modified.
